parameters.description: Send notifications to your own QQ Push destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise qq:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native QQ Push form payload delivered straight to the QQ Push API.
parameters.gateway_body_template: msg={* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment QQ Push destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to QQ Push API (no Apprise)

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's QQ Push token
